testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.integration.TwampLoopbackTest

testcase.name: sequential sessions on same controller - both complete without error()
unauthenticated loopback - 100 packets - packetsRecv == 100 and fwdLossPct == 0()

testsuite.system-out: 21:14:19.922 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector listening on /127.0.0.1:55010 21:14:19.934 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 21:14:22.038 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 21:14:24.152 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector stopped 21:14:24.157 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector listening on /127.0.0.1:55148 21:14:24.170 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 21:14:26.683 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector stopped 21:14:26.697 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector listening on /127.0.0.1:55150 21:14:26.713 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 21:14:28.928 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector stopped
